_comment: Test sharding config for CI parallelisation. A CI matrix reads this file and runs each shard in a separate job — splitting slow Testcontainers-backed shards from fast unit shards, and isolating the 'security' shard so a regression there blocks the merge gate even when other shards are skipped.

unit.description: Fast unit tests that need no container / no network. Runs on every push.

architecture.description: ArchUnit rules enforcing ring discipline, naming, DDD, module anatomy. Must pass before merge.

security.description: Story #43 — signature-validation red-team tests and AWS-published test vectors. Failure here means a crypto regression or a bypass of the SigningCertURL / SigV4 allow-lists. Blocks the merge gate.

persistence.description: EF Core tests that spin up Postgres / TimescaleDB via Testcontainers. Slower; runs on PR + nightly.
